form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd (Fr3) over 1785m at Stawell was 2nd-6 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Loan Sailor (2:11.30) in NR up to 40 on April 3 at $13. Capable of going well on best performances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd (Fr3) over 1785m at Stawell was 2nd-6 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Loan Sailor (2:11.30) in NR up to 40 on April 3 at $13. Capable of going well on best performances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up in the early stages of the home straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Began his campaign last start running 7th (Fr1) over 2160m after showing early speed at Echuca beaten 35 m by Parisian Bandit (2:43.10) in NR up to 37 on April 5 at $61. Not keen on his chances in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Began his campaign last start running 7th (Fr1) over 2160m after showing early speed at Echuca beaten 35 m by Parisian Bandit (2:43.10) in NR up to 37 on April 5 at $61. Not keen on his chances in this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to tire leaving the 800m mark and was beaten 72.3m.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr6) over 2160m at Echuca, beaten 9 m by Parisian Bandit (2:43.10) in NR up to 37 on April 5 at $6.50. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr7) over 1690m at Kilmore, at the bell was 5th-6.48 beaten 6 m by Olly Odd Potts (2:07.80) in NR up to 35 on April 2 at $8. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr6) over 2160m at Echuca, beaten 9 m by Parisian Bandit (2:43.10) in NR up to 37 on April 5 at $6.50. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr7) over 1690m at Kilmore, at the bell was 5th-6.48 beaten 6 m by Olly Odd Potts (2:07.80) in NR up to 35 on April 2 at $8. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr3) over 1900m after showing early pace at Boort beaten 23 m by Classact (2:23.90) in NR 45 to 49 on March 1 at $10. At the run before 5th (Fr3) over 1690m after showing early speed at Kilmore beaten 16 m by Regal Rock (2:05.00) in NR up to 45 on February 12 at $81. Strong contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 6th (Fr3) over 1900m after showing early pace at Boort beaten 23 m by Classact (2:23.90) in NR 45 to 49 on March 1 at $10. At the run before 5th (Fr3) over 1690m after showing early speed at Kilmore beaten 16 m by Regal Rock (2:05.00) in NR up to 45 on February 12 at $81. Strong contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced in the early and middle stages of the race.
Inconvenienced on the final turn by Princess Alexandra.
Gave ground over the concluding stages to be beaten 48m into 10th place.
Making contact to the near side sulky wheel of Salsboy approaching the 300m.

form.formComment: Two back was fifth behind Inexorable at Cranbourne over 2080m in a NR 40 to 46 on March 29 at $14. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third behind Bond Girl at Cranbourne over 1609m in a NR up to 39 on April 3 at $3.10. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was fifth behind Inexorable at Cranbourne over 2080m in a NR 40 to 46 on March 29 at $14. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third behind Bond Girl at Cranbourne over 1609m in a NR up to 39 on April 3 at $3.10. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly rounding the first turn.
Broke gait clear of interference rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr6) over 1755m at Echuca beaten 16 m by Kimchi (2:09.90) in NR 38 to 44 on April 5 at $26. At the start before was well back in the run when 7th (Fr6) over 1690m after racing wide at this track, at the bell was 9th-17.71 beaten 15 m by Major Maurie (2:03.10) in NR 41 to 44 on March 17 at $19. Can improve enough to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr6) over 1755m at Echuca beaten 16 m by Kimchi (2:09.90) in NR 38 to 44 on April 5 at $26. At the start before was well back in the run when 7th (Fr6) over 1690m after racing wide at this track, at the bell was 9th-17.71 beaten 15 m by Major Maurie (2:03.10) in NR 41 to 44 on March 17 at $19. Can improve enough to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to tire leaving the 400m mark to be beaten 32.2m.

form.formComment: Racing in great heart. Last start saluted by 3.5 m (Sr2) at Echuca (2:43.10) beating Mands Pearl in NR up to 37 on April 5 at $3.20. Sure to play a major role again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Racing in great heart. Last start saluted by 3.5 m (Sr2) at Echuca (2:43.10) beating Mands Pearl in NR up to 37 on April 5 at $3.20. Sure to play a major role again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to tire leaving the 500m mark to be beaten 67.0m.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, then settled down to finish fifth over 2160m at Echuca last time out. Before that 6th (Fr3) over 1690m after showing early speed at Kilmore, beaten 25 m by Allgood Vinnie (2:04.50) in NR up to 45 on March 26 at $23. Must do a lot more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't do much last time out, then settled down to finish fifth over 2160m at Echuca last time out. Before that 6th (Fr3) over 1690m after showing early speed at Kilmore, beaten 25 m by Allgood Vinnie (2:04.50) in NR up to 45 on March 26 at $23. Must do a lot more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in and paced roughly at approx 1300m.
Checked and held up behind the tiring Dashing Cowboy from approx 450m.
